prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `996ec1f3`.
codex_response:
Implemented `996ec1f3` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: find the single-color full-width row and full-height column that share a color, then compress the layout to a `3x3` cross where the middle row/column use that separator color and the four corners are the dominant colors of the four quadrants. The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/verifier.py#L4), and the generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/generator.py#L47) builds fixed `19x19` instances with one separator cross, four large inset dominant-color blocks, and noisy border bands to match the official family. No new primitive was needed.

I used the `opus46` hint; the `sonnet45` hint was partially misleading and I documented that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/notes.md#L1). Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` verified examples, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 996ec1f3` passed `1000/1000`. Files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/generator.py#L1), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_996ec1f3/notes.md#L1), and the generated artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/996ec1f3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/996ec1f3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/996ec1f3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/996ec1f3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/996ec1f3/previews/preview_03.png).
